name: Inverse Mandelbrot Realm
description: Instead of iterating coordinates, we iterate color-space vectors through the Mandelbrot map. Each pixel's RGB becomes a complex number that orbits and escapes, creating alien fractal color fields.
author: AI

params.name: Color Zoom
params.description: Zoom level into the color-space fractal.

params.name: Colormap Rotate
params.description: Global hue rotation of the colormap.

params.name: Bailout Radius
params.description: Escape radius — lower values create more intricate boundaries.
